delta.text: I
'll start by pressing home and taking a screenshot to confirm the current state.

content.text: I'll start by pressing home and taking a screenshot to confirm the current state.
请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

delta.text: I'm
on the home screen. I'll open Settings app.

see "显示与亮度" (Display & Brightness) in the settings. Let me tap on it.

delta.text: I can
see the Display & Brightness page with the brightness slider ("屏幕亮度"). The slider appears
to be at a low position but I need to drag it to the absolute minimum
(leftmost). Let me get the XML to find the exact coordinates of the brightness slider.

content.text: I can see the Display & Brightness page with the brightness slider ("屏幕亮度"). The slider appears to be at a low position but I need to drag it to the absolute minimum (leftmost). Let me get the XML to find the exact coordinates of the brightness slider.
